text.title: PWA Advanced Features Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing a PWA Advanced Features artefact filled from a realistic input bundle. Trace runs from input brief → evidence gathering → schema fill → validator pass → review surfacing.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo operator triggers PWA Advanced Features on a representative input bundle; the artefact passes the validator and reaches `ready_for_review`.

list.item: Source-of-truth refs: ≥1 verifiable URL + ≥1 dashboard or transcript reference.
Triggering activity matches AGENTS.md 'Applies If' list (ALL items hold).
Step 1 — `prerequisites_ok=true`; all refs reachable and citable.
Step 2 — evidence array populated with ≥1 citation per non-trivial field.
